title: peucedanum brevipes
intro: Peucedanum brevipes, also known as short-stemmed masterwort, is a species of flowering plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Peucedanum brevipes include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Peucedanum brevipes can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
